pull_request.title: Handle unavailable microphone startup and model downloads

comment.body:
When startRecording() succeeds but getTimestamp() keeps returning ERROR_INVALID_OPERATION until the timeout, this
    failure path marks the microphone unavailable while leaving the already-started AudioRecord and listener running,
    then starts the publisher lifecycle. After PublisherManager.startPublishers() resumes it, periodic callbacks can
    still read and publish audio with invalid timestamps despite showing the unavailable-microphone dialog; stop/detach/
    release the recorder, or avoid starting the publisher, on this path.
